nasb.text: Half of it he burns in the fire; over this half he eats meat as he roasts a roast and is satisfied. He also warms himself and says, “Aha! I am warm, I have seen the fire.”

esv.text: Half of it he burns in the fire. Over the half he eats meat; he roasts it and is satisfied. Also he warms himself and says, “Aha, I am warm, I have seen the fire!”

cnv.text: 他把木頭的一半放在火裡燃燒； 在上面烤肉； 吃了烤肉，並且吃飽了， 就自己烤火取暖，說： “哈哈！我暖和了，我看見火了。”

ccb.text: 他用一半木头烤肉，饱餐一顿，并用火取暖，说：“啊！我这里有火，真暖和。”

csbs.text: 他用一半的木头烧火， 在其上做肉吃； 他烤肉、吃饱， 又自己取暖，说： “啊哈，我暖和了！ 我感到火热了。”
